description: PandaDoc is a document workflow and e-signature platform for creating, sending, tracking, and signing documents. It also supports embedded document experiences and integrations with other business systems.
summary: PandaDoc exposes a REST HTTP API at https://api.pandadoc.com and an MCP server at https://mcp.pandadoc.com/v1/mcp; the REST API supports API key or OAuth 2.0 authentication, while MCP authentication is documented only as requiring a logged-in PandaDoc account.
